Student Enrollment in Special Programs

Breakdowns of each program, GATE [Gifted And Talented Education], ESL [English as a Second Language], and the Bilingual Program, broken down by the family history and age of each student.

Data collected across Elementary, Middle and High Schools from two school districts.

Treemap

Data source

Data collected by redistricting projects ahead of the 2024 school district redraws of the district at hand.

Treemap transitions inspired by: https://observablehq.com/notebook-kit/ex/d3/animated-treemap.
Some code inspired by: https://gist.github.com/ganezasan/52fced34d2182483995f0ca3960fe228 and https://strongriley.github.io/d3/ex/treemap.html.
